---
title: "Statistics"
subtitle: "불확실성 하에서 데이터로부터 결론을 이끌어내는 학문"
description: |
  확률론부터 추정, 검정, 회귀, 종단 분석, 생존 분석, FDA까지
  Casella & Berger의 체계를 뼈대로, 응용 분야를 확장하는 통계학 콘텐츠 목록이다.
categories:
  - Statistics
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 03/01/2022
---

# Overview

* 2023-03-14, 산술·기하·조화평균의 직관적 이해
* 2023-11-07, [Variables](./05-variable.qmd)
* 2025-12-08, [데이터 분석의 개념과 도구 생태계](./00-basic-concept.qmd)
* 2026-03-16, [피어슨 상관계수의 정의와 한계](./02-pearson-correlation.qmd)
* 2026-03-16, [상관계수를 예측 정확도로 쓰면 안 되는 이유](./03-correlation-vs-accuracy.qmd)
* 2026-03-20, [통계학 개요 — 정의, 프레임워크, 학습 경로](./04-statistics-overview.qmd)

---

# Part I: 확률과 분포 (Casella & Berger Ch.1-4)

## 확률론 (Probability Theory, Ch.1)

* 2026-03-28, [확률론 개요 — 집합론에서 분포 함수까지, 통계적 추론의 수학적 기반](./49-probability-theory-overview.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [확률론의 언어: 집합론 — 표본공간, 사건, σ-대수, 콜모고로프 공리](./37-set-theory.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [확률론의 공리적 기초 — 콜모고로프 공리, 포함-배제, 연속성 정리](./38-axiomatic-foundations.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [확률의 계산 규칙 — 조건부 확률, 곱셈 법칙, 전확률 정리, 독립성, 조합론](./39-calculus-of-probabilities.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [경우의 수와 조합론 — 곱의 법칙, 순열, 조합, 이항 정리](./40-counting.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [조합론 심화 — 중복조합, 다항계수, 비둘기집 원리, 포함-배제 원리](./46-counting-advanced.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [결과 열거법 — 트리 다이어그램, 4가지 추출 방식, 복합 실험 표본공간](./41-enumerating-outcomes.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [조건부 확률과 베이즈 정리 — 정보 갱신, 곱셈 법칙, 전확률 정리](./42-conditional-independence.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [독립성 심화 — 독립의 정의, 상호독립, 조건부독립, 의료 스크리닝](./47-independence.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [확률변수 — 가측함수, PMF·PDF·CDF, 이산·연속·혼합형, 변수변환](./43-random-variables.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [분포 함수 — CDF 완전 이론, 분위수, 생존·위험 함수, PIT, ECDF](./44-distribution-functions.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [밀도 함수와 질량 함수 — PDF·PMF 이론, 절대연속성, 지지 집합, 커널 표현](./45-density-mass-functions.qmd)
* 2026-03-27, [주요 분포의 밀도 함수 — 이산·연속 분포 PDF·PMF, 정규화 증명, 혼합 분포](./48-distribution-families.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Probability Distribution (→ [주요 분포의 밀도 함수](./48-distribution-families.qmd) 참조)

## 변환과 기대값 (Transformations & Expectations, Ch.2)

* 2026-03-28, [변환과 기대값 개요 — 변수변환, 기댓값, 분산, 공분산, MGF](./50-transformations-expectations-overview.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [확률변수 함수의 분포 — CDF법, 변수변환법(야코비안), MGF법](./51-distributions-of-functions.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [기대값 — 정의, LOTUS, 선형성, 분산, 공분산, 적률, MGF, 부등식](./52-expected-values.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [기대값 vs 실현값 — E[X]와 X(ω), 추정량과 추정값, 기대 손실과 경험 손실](./66-expected-value-vs-realized-value.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Variance
* 2026-03-28, [적률과 적률생성함수 — 적률 체계, MGF 존재·유일성, 큐뮬런트, 특성함수, 체르노프 바운드](./53-moments-mgf.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [적분 기호 아래서의 미분 — 라이프니츠 규칙, 지배수렴정리, 스코어 함수, 피셔 정보량](./54-differentiating-under-integral.qmd)

## 분포 가족 (Common Families of Distributions, Ch.3)

* 2026-03-28, [분포 가족 개요 — 이산·연속 분포, 지수족, 위치-척도족, 확률 부등식](./55-common-families-overview.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [지수족 (Exponential Family) — 정의, 자연모��, 충분통계량, 곡선 지수족, GLM 연결](./76-exponential-family.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [위치-척도족 (Location-Scale Family) — 정의, 표준화, 피벗 양, 강건 추정](./77-location-scale-family.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [확률 부등식과 항등식 — 체비셰프, 젠센, 코시-슈바르츠, 스타인 보조정리](./78-inequalities-identities.qmd)

### 이산 확률 변수 (Discrete Random Variables)

* 2026-03-28, [이산 분포 — 이산균등, 초기하, 이항, 포아송, 음이항, 기하 분포 이론과 실무](./56-common-families-discrete.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [이산균등 분포 (Discrete Uniform Distribution)](./58-common-families-discrete-uniform.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [베르누이 분포 (Bernoulli Distribution)](./60-common-families-discrete-bernoulli.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [이항 분포 (Binomial Distribution)](./61-common-families-discrete-binomial.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [포아송 분포 (Poisson Distribution)](./62-common-families-discrete-poisson.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [음이항 분포 (Negative Binomial Distribution)](./63-common-families-discrete-negative-binomial.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [기하 분포 (Geometric Distribution)](./64-common-families-discrete-geometric.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [초기하 분포 (Hypergeometric Distribution)](./59-common-families-discrete-hypergeometric.qmd)

### 연속 확률 변수 (Continuous Random Variables)

* 2026-03-29, [연속 분포 — 정규, 감마, 베타, 코시, 로그정규 이론과 실무](./67-common-families-continuous.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [연속균등 분포 (Continuous Uniform Distribution)](./57-common-families-continuous-uniform.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [정규 분포 (Normal Distribution)](./68-normal-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [감마 분포 (Gamma Distribution)](./69-common-families-continuous-gamma-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [지수 분포 (Exponential Distribution)](./70-common-families-continuous-exponential-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [베타 분포 (Beta Distribution)](./72-common-families-continuous-beta-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [카이제곱 분포 (Chi-Squared Distribution)](./71-common-families-continuous-chi-squared-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [코시 분포 (Cauchy Distribution)](./73-common-families-continuous-cauchy-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [로그정규 분포 (Log-Normal Distribution)](./74-common-families-continuous-log-normal-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-29, [라플라스 분포 (Laplace Distribution)](./75-common-families-continuous-laplace-distribution.qmd)

## 다변량 확률 변수 (Multiple Random Variables, Ch.4)

* 2026-03-30, [다변량 확률변수 개요 — 결합분포, 조건부분포, 독립성, 계층모형, 공분산, 다변량 정규](./79-multiple-random-variables-overview.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [결합분포와 주변분포 (Joint and Marginal Distributions)](./80-joint-marginal-distributions.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [조건부분포와 독립성 (Conditional Distributions and Independence)](./81-conditional-distributions-independence.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [이변량 변환 (Bivariate Transformations)](./82-bivariate-transformations.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [계층모형과 혼합분포 (Hierarchical Models and Mixture Distributions)](./83-hierarchical-models-mixtures.qmd)
* 2026-03-30, [공분산과 상관계수 (Covariance and Correlation)](./84-covariance-correlation.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Multivariate Distributions
* 2026-03-30, [확률 부등식과 항등식 (Inequalities and Identities)](./78-inequalities-identities.qmd)

---

# Part II: 표본과 데이터 축소 (Casella & Berger Ch.5-6)

## 확률 표본의 성질 (Properties of a Random Sample, Ch.5)

* 2026-03-31, [확률 표본의 성질 개요 (Properties of a Random Sample: Overview)](./87-properties-random-sample-overview.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [확률 표본의 기본 개념 (Basic Concepts of Random Samples)](./88-random-sample-basics.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [확률변수 합의 표본분포 (Sums of Random Variables from a Random Sample)](./89-sums-random-variables.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [정규 모집단에서의 표본분포 (Sampling from the Normal Distribution)](./90-normal-sampling-distributions.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [순서통계량 (Order Statistics)](./91-order-statistics.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [확률 표본의 생성 (Generating a Random Sample)](./95-generating-random-sample.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [수렴 개념 (Convergence Concepts)](./92-convergence-concepts.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [확률수렴 (Convergence in Probability)](./09-convergence.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [거의 확실한 수렴 (Almost Sure Convergence)](./93-almost-sure-convergence.qmd)
* 2026-03-31, [분포수렴 (Convergence in Distribution)](./94-convergence-in-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-03-26, [Monte Carlo Simulation](./36-monte-carlo-simulation.qmd)

## 데이터 축소의 원리 (Principles of Data Reduction, Ch.6)

* 2026-03-20, [데이터 축소의 원리 (Sufficiency, Likelihood, Equivariance)](./21-data-reduction.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [충분성 원리 (The Sufficiency Principle)](./96-sufficiency-principle.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [우도원리 (The Likelihood Principle)](./97-likelihood-principle.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [등변원리 (The Equivariance Principle)](./98-equivariance-principle.qmd)

---

# Part III: 통계적 추론 (Casella & Berger Ch.7-9)

## 점추정 (Point Estimation, Ch.7)

* 2026-04-02, [점추정 개요 (Point Estimation: Overview)](./99-point-estimation-overview.qmd)
* 2026-03-23, [함수의 합 vs 합성함수 — Sequential vs Joint 추정](../Math/function/function_addition_vs_composition.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [추정량 탐색 방법 (Methods of Finding Estimators)](./100-methods-finding-estimators.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [최대우도추정량 (Maximum Likelihood Estimators)](./101-maximum-likelihood-estimators.qmd)
* 2023-03-29, [Maximum Likelihood Estimation & Statistical Bias](./22-mle.qmd)
* 2023-03-24, [MLE & REML](./23-rmle.qmd)
* 2023-01-17, [BLUE (Best Linear Unbiased Estimator)](./24-blue.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [베이즈 추정량 (Bayes Estimators)](./102-bayes-estimators.qmd)
* 2026-04-02, [EM 알고리즘 (The EM Algorithm)](./103-em-algorithm.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Mean Squared Error
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Best Unbiased Estimators
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Sufficiency and Unbiasedness
* 1111-11-11, Evaluation Methods of Estimators - Loss Function Optimality

## 가설검정 (Hypothesis Testing, Ch.8)

* 1111-11-11, Hypothesis Testing
* 1111-11-11, Permutation Test
* 2023-01-16, [Normality Check](./25-normality.qmd)

### 검정 방법 (Methods of Finding Tests)

* 1111-11-11, Likelihood Ratio Tests
* 1111-11-11, Bayesian Tests
* 1111-11-11, Union-Intersection and Intersection-Union Tests

### 검정 평가 (Methods of Evaluating Tests)

* 1111-11-11, Power
* 1111-11-11, Error Probabilities and the Power Function
* 1111-11-11, Most Powerful Tests
* 2022-12-28, [p-values](./26-p-value.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Loss Function Optimality
* 1111-11-11, Multiple Testing
* 1111-11-11, Sample Size Calculation
* 1111-11-11, A/B Testing

### 분산 분석 (ANOVA)

* 2023-01-07, [ANOVA](./27-anova.qmd)
  * 2023-01-27, [ANCOVA](./28-ancova.qmd)
  * 2023-01-27, [Repeated Measures ANOVA](./29-rm-anova.qmd)
  * 2023-01-28, [MANOVA](./30-manova.qmd)

## 구간추정 (Interval Estimation, Ch.9)

* 1111-11-11, Methods of Finding Interval Estimators
* 1111-11-11, Pivotal Quantities
* 1111-11-11, Pivoting the CDF
* 1111-11-11, Bayesian Intervals
* 1111-11-11, Methods of Evaluating Interval Estimators (Size, Coverage)

---

# Part IV: 점근 이론 (Casella & Berger Ch.10)

* 1111-11-11, Asymptotic Point Estimation - Consistency
* 1111-11-11, Asymptotic Point Estimation - Efficiency
* 1111-11-11, Asymptotic Robustness
* 1111-11-11, Asymptotic Hypothesis Testing
* 1111-11-11, Asymptotic Interval Estimation

---

# 회귀 분석 (Regression)

* 1111-11-11, Least Square and Simple Linear Regression
* 1111-11-11, Multiple Linear Regression

## 일반화 선형 모형 (Generalized Linear Models, McCullagh & Nelder)

* 2026-03-07, [GLM — t-test부터 로지스틱 회귀까지, 하나의 프레임워크로](./31-glm.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, GLM 구조 개요 (Link Function, Variance Function) — Ch.2
* 1111-11-11, Models for Continuous Data (Normal, Gamma) — Ch.3
* 1111-11-11, Binary Data (Logistic Regression) — Ch.4
* 1111-11-11, Models for Polytomous Data (Multinomial Regression) — Ch.5
* 1111-11-11, Log-linear Models — Ch.6
* 1111-11-11, Poisson Regression
* 1111-11-11, Quasi-likelihood Functions — Ch.9
* 1111-11-11, Model Checking — Ch.12

---

# 범주형 데이터 분석 (Categorical Data Analysis)

* 2023-03-17, [Categorical Data Analysis](./33-categorical-data.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Introduction

---

# 종단 데이터 분석 (Longitudinal Data Analysis)

## LDA 기초

* 2023-03-23, [LDA (1) - Intro](./LDA/basic-00-intro.qmd)
* 2023-03-24, [LDA (2) - Concepts & Covariance Models](./LDA/basic-01-covariance_model.qmd)
* 2023-03-25, [LDA (3) - Weight Least Square & REML](./LDA/basic-03-wls.qmd)
* 2023-03-23, [LDA - Survival / Cox Model](./LDA/survival_lda.qmd)
* 2023-03-23, [LDA - CD4+ Cell Depletion](./LDA/basic-04-CD4-plus.qmd)
* 2023-04-23, [LDA - EDA](./LDA/basic-05-eda.qmd)

## Mixed Models & Longitudinal Analysis

* 2026-03-07, [로드맵 — 종단 데이터 분석 전체 현황](./32-mixed-model-roadmap.qmd)

### Linear Mixed Model (LMM)

* 2026-03-07, [01 — 왜 Mixed Model인가 (GLM 한계, ICC, Fixed/Random)](./LDA/01-mixed-model-intro.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [02 — 모델 구조 (Random Intercept, Slope, 공분산)](./LDA/02-mixed-model-structure.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [03 — 추정과 모델 선택 (ML/REML, LRT, AIC/BIC)](./LDA/03-mixed-model-estimation.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [04 — 실무 예시 (AI Agent 개인화 + Airbnb)](./LDA/04-mixed-model-practice.qmd)

### Generalized Linear Mixed Model (GLMM)

* 2026-03-07, [05 — GLMM 개요 (LMM 확장, Family/Link)](./LDA/05-mixed-model-glmm-intro.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [06 — GLMM 이진 결과 (로지스틱 혼합 모델)](./LDA/06-mixed-model-glmm-binary.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [07 — GLMM 카운트 결과 (포아송, 음이항, ZIP)](./LDA/07-mixed-model-glmm-count.qmd)

### Generalized Estimating Equations (GEE)

* 2026-03-07, [08 — GEE (Marginal 효과, Working Correlation)](./LDA/08-mixed-model-gee-intro.qmd)

### GAM / GAMM

* 2026-03-07, [09 — GAM/GAMM (Spline, 비선형 종단)](./LDA/09-mixed-model-gam-intro.qmd)

### 기법 비교

* 2026-03-07, [11 — LMM/GLMM/GEE/GAMM/FDA 비교 및 선택 가이드](./LDA/11-mixed-model-comparison.qmd)

### ML / DL / RL for Longitudinal Data

* 2026-03-08, [ML for Longitudinal Data — Overview](../Machine_Learning/12-mixed-model-ml-longitudinal.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Random Survival Forest (RSF)](../Machine_Learning/21-mixed-model-ml-rsf.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [XGBoost + 시간 피처 공학](../Machine_Learning/22-mixed-model-ml-xgboost.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Hidden Markov Model (HMM) for Longitudinal Data](../Machine_Learning/23-mixed-model-ml-hmm.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Lasso / Elastic Net / glmmLasso — 종단 데이터의 변수 선택](../Machine_Learning/24-mixed-model-ml-regularization.qmd)

* 2026-03-08, [DL for Longitudinal Data — Overview](../Deep_Learning/13-mixed-model-dl-longitudinal.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [LSTM/GRU for Longitudinal Data](../Deep_Learning/25-mixed-model-dl-lstm.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN)](../Deep_Learning/26-mixed-model-dl-tcn.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Temporal Transformer for Longitudinal Data](../Deep_Learning/27-mixed-model-dl-transformer.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Neural ODE — 연속 시간 역학으로 종단 데이터 모델링](../Deep_Learning/28-mixed-model-dl-neural-ode.qmd)

* 2026-03-08, [RL for Longitudinal Data — Overview](../Deep_Learning/14-mixed-model-rl-longitudinal.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Contextual Bandit for Personalization](../Deep_Learning/29-mixed-model-rl-bandit.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Dynamic Treatment Regime (DTR)](../Deep_Learning/30-mixed-model-rl-dtr.qmd)
  * 2026-03-08, [Offline RL for Safe Policy Learning](../Deep_Learning/31-mixed-model-rl-offline.qmd)

### 진단 / EDA / 층화

* 2026-03-07, [15 — 회귀 진단: 잔차, 이상치, Bootstrap 추론](./LDA/15-mixed-model-diagnostics.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [16 — 층화 분석: nest+map, 교호작용 vs 층화, Shrinkage](./LDA/16-mixed-model-stratified.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [17 — 종단 EDA: Spaghetti Plot, 공분산 구조, 결측 패턴, ICC 사전 추정](./LDA/17-mixed-model-eda.qmd)

### 패널 데이터 분석 (Panel Data Analysis)

* 2026-03-07, [18 — 패널 데이터 (1): 내생성, Fixed Effects, Hausman Test](./LDA/18-mixed-model-panel-intro.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [19 — 패널 데이터 (2): Difference-in-Differences, 이벤트 스터디](./LDA/19-mixed-model-panel-did.qmd)

### 연구 설계 (Study Design)

* 1111-11-11, 연구 설계 Overview: 역학·임상시험 계보와 IT A/B 테스트
* 1111-11-11, RCT & A/B Test 설계 원칙
* 1111-11-11, 관찰 연구: 코호트, 케이스-컨트롤, 단면 연구
* 1111-11-11, 준실험적 설계: ITS, RDD, Stepped Wedge
* 1111-11-11, 인과 추론 프레임워크 총정리

---

# 시계열 분석 (Time Series)

* 2023-03-23, [Basic (1) - Stationarity Checking](./time_series/01_basic.qmd)
* 2026-03-28, [시계열 회귀 vs 일반 회귀 — 오차항 독립성과 외부 변수 포함 모델](./65-time-series-regression-vs-ols.qmd)

---

# 생존 분석 (Survival Analysis)

* 2026-03-20, [생존 분석 개요](./survival/01-survival-overview.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Kaplan-Meier Survival Curves and Log-Rank Test (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.2)
* 1111-11-11, Cox Proportional Hazards Model (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.3)
* 1111-11-11, Evaluating the Proportional Hazards Assumption (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.4)
* 1111-11-11, The Stratified Cox Procedure (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.5)
* 1111-11-11, Time-Dependent Variables (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.6)
* 1111-11-11, Parametric Survival Models (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.7)
* 1111-11-11, Recurrent Event Survival Analysis (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.8)
* 1111-11-11, Competing Risks Survival Analysis (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.9)
* 1111-11-11, Design Issues for Randomized Trials (Kleinbaum & Klein Ch.10)

---

# 함수형 데이터 분석 (Functional Data Analysis)

* 2025-11-15, [Functional Data Analysis](./FDA/index.qmd)
* 2024-07-17, [RT-PCR 신호의 함수 자료 분석(FDA) 응용](./FDA/topics.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [FDA — 종단 데이터 맥락의 함수형 데이터 분석 및 Functional Regression](./LDA/10-mixed-model-functional-intro.qmd)
